trigger.description: A Trello card whose name contains @alto.

settings_schema.label: API Key
settings_schema.description: Trello API key. Set in server .env file.

settings_schema.description: Trello API token. Set in server .env file.

settings_schema.description: The Trello board ID to monitor.

settings_schema.label: Poll Interval (seconds)
settings_schema.description: How often to check for new cards (default 30).
